commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=574e8844179f3691ae4b5781366ba0c5bec3ad09)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes CI from Node 20/22 to 22/24, updates the tsup build target from node20 to node22, and raises the README requirement to Node.js >=22.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a support-floor maintenance PR, not a bug report with runtime reproduction steps.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is maintainer judgment on the Node 20 support policy plus contributor proof, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: chore: bump CI/build Node.js targets from 20 to 22/24
target.body:
## Summary

Node.js 20 [reached end-of-life on 2026-04-30](https://github.com/nodejs/Release#release-schedule) — it's no longer receiving security updates. This bumps the CI matrix and build target to the currently-maintained LTS lines:

- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: test matrix `[20, 22]` → `[22, 24]` (Node 22 is in maintenance LTS until 2027-04, Node 24 is active LTS until 2026-10/maintenance until 2028-04)
- `package.json`: `tsup` build target `node20` → `node22`
- `README.md`: "Requirements" now says `Node.js >= 22`

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm run lint` — passes (oxfmt/oxlint clean on `src`/`test`)
- [x] `pnpm run typecheck` — passes
- [x] `pnpm test` — all 16 tests pass
- [x] `pnpm run build` — builds successfully with `--target node22`

All checks run locally on Node v22.22.3.
target.author: joevenner

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
